For security vulnerabilities (crashes/hangs/OOM on untrusted input), do NOT file
here — use private reporting instead: see SECURITY.md.
-->

## Summary

A clear, one-line description of the problem.

## Reproduction

Steps, code, or a command line that triggers it. Attach a minimal input file if
the bug depends on a specific bitstream.

```rust
// minimal snippet, or the exact CLI invocation
```

- **Expected:**
